code: import{useSelector,useDispatch}from'react-redux';import{addToCart,removeFromCart,updateQuantity,setReservation}from'../store/slices/cartslice';import{cartAPI}from'../services/api';export const useCart=()=>{const dispatch=useDispatch();const cart=useSelector(state=>state.cart);const addItem=async function(product,variant){let quantity=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:1;try{const cartId=localStorage.getItem('cartId')||"cart_".concat(Date.now());localStorage.setItem('cartId',cartId);const response=await cartAPI.reserve({product_id:product._id,variant_id:variant.variant_id,quantity,cart_id:cartId});if(response.data.status==='reserved'){dispatch(setReservation({productId:product._id,variantId:variant.variant_id,reservationId:response.data.reservation_id}));dispatch(addToCart({product,variant,quantity}));return{success:true};}}catch(error){var _error$response,_error$response$data;return{success:false,error:((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:(_error$response$data=_error$response.data)===null||_error$response$data===void 0?void 0:_error$response$data.error)||'Failed to add to cart'};}};const removeItem=(productId,variantId)=>{dispatch(removeFromCart({productId,variantId}));};const changeQuantity=(productId,variantId,quantity)=>{dispatch(updateQuantity({productId,variantId,quantity}));};const getCartTotal=()=>{return cart.items.reduce((total,item)=>total+item.price*item.quantity,0);};const getItemCount=()=>{return cart.items.reduce((count,item)=>count+item.quantity,0);};return{items:cart.items,addItem,removeItem,changeQuantity,getCartTotal,getItemCount};};
